pageContext.name: Gambit & Rogue
pageContext.description: Whatever else life brings, I know you, and you know me.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Gambit & Rogue Fine Art Print, an energetic Marvel Comics art print by artist Richard Luong celebrating an iconic comic book couple.  Sugah and Cajun spice make fighting Sentinels twice as nice! In this explosive illustration, Anna Marie and Remy LeBeau, better known as Rogue and Gambit of the X-Men, leap into action against a wave of mutant-killing machines. They put their mutant powers to the test, battling side by side with kinetically charged playing cards and super strength in order to save the day and ensure a brighter future for mutantkind.  Each Gambit & Rogue Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed format, this X-Men artwork is sure to steal your heart (and not your powers).  Pair this Marvel wall art with the Rogue Maquette and Gambit Maquette by Sideshow, each sold separately, for a mighty mutant display in your home collection!  Team up with these dueling lovebirds from down south and bring home the Gambit & Rogue Fine Art Print by Richard Luong today.
